data.title: MongoDB Shares Are Trading Down Today: What's Going On?
data.description: MongoDB reported earnings of $1.16 per share, higher than the analyst consensus estimate of 69 cents. Revenue for the quarter came in at $529.4 million, beating the expected $497.75 million and reflecting an increase from $432.94 million in the same period last year.
